style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like suspended glitter, forming a soft ethereal glow around Machamp's body in pastel pink and lavender hues. Petal-shaped aura particles float slowly in a circular pattern, refracting light into delicate rainbow halos, while faint musical note vibrations shimmer with a gentle, harmonic pulse. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
